name: Silk Touch
description: Barely-there brush of fabric on smooth surface

simple: silk fabric brushing across polished surface
standard: silk fabric brushing across polished surface
whisper soft touch landing with delicate precision
detailed: silk fabric brushing across polished surface
whisper soft touch landing with delicate precision
breath-thin tone settling into perfect silence

instruments: pure sine tone at concert pitch
porcelain bowl struck with felt tip
